'''Ulicia''' was an [[Factory world/Legends|industrial planet]] located in the [[Ulicia system/Legends|Ulicia system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]], which was governed by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. It was positioned along the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Shaltin Tunnels/Legends|Shaltin Tunnels]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the CSA [[Auditor-General|executive]] [[Hart-and-Parn Gorra-Fiolla]] recovered a [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] named [[Naven Crel]] from the [[Commex's headquarters|headquarters]] of the [[Commex]] corporation located at Ulicia.

==Description==
Ulicia was a drab [[Factory world/Legends|industrial world]] located in the [[Ulicia system/Legends|Ulicia system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was part of the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] region's [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] and was situated on the fringes of the [[Thandon Cluster|Thandon Nebula]], an area of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] that the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] had struggled to develop.<ref name="Atlas" />

Positioned near the planet [[Abo Dreth]],<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|278|Ulicia}}</ref> Ulicia was connected to the [[Atchorb system/Legends|Atchorb system]] by the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Shaltin Tunnels/Legends|Shaltin Tunnels]], while [[Unidentified Brosi–Ekibo hyperlane|another hyperlane]] linked the planet to the [[Abo Dreth system/Legends|Abo Dreth]] and [[Perin system/Legends|Perin systems]]. Additionally, Ulicia served as the last point on these [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] routes before leaving Corporate [[Sector/Legends|Sector]] borders and entering [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] and [[Trianii Space/Legends|Trianii Space]], respectively.<ref name="Atlas" />

==History==
[[File:Priority_X.jpg|thumb|right|240px|Hart-and-Parn Gorra-Fiolla (right) and her prisoner, Naven Crel (center)]]
Tasked with capturing a [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] named [[Naven Crel]] from the [[Commex]] corporation at Ulicia and bringing him back to the [[Executive Directorship Board|Direx Board]], the Corporate Sector Authority's ruling body, CSA [[Auditor-General|executive]] [[Hart-and-Parn Gorra-Fiolla]] traveled to the planet<ref name="GCPX" /> in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="TERC note">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of "[[Priority: X]]," which is set shortly after [[Hart-and-Parn Gorra-Fiolla]]'s recovery of [[Naven Crel]] from Ulicia, to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CSWE" /> After successfully recovering Crel, who was [[Prison/Legends|imprisoned]] in [[Commex's headquarters]], Fiolla barely escaped Ulicia aboard her [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Tydia Rish]]''.<ref name="GCPX" />

==Locations==
The planet Ulicia contained the headquarters for the Commex corporation.<ref name="GCPX" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ulicia was first mentioned in the short story "[[Priority: X]]," written by [[George R. Strayton]] and published in [[Topps]]' [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 12|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 12]] in [[August]] [[1997]].<ref name="GCPX" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Ulicia [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Ulicia, in grid square S-3.<ref name="Atlas" />
